en: Thanks for that. Yeah, you really kept me safe while you ran off to fuck the phone book.
Oh, fuck off. You're a heck. I'm a conservative heck.
And then you hit it because you were so scared of how fucking awful you are.
ko: 그리고 너는 그가 얼마나 끔찍한지 두려워서 때렸어.

en: You were only with me to get to power. Well, you got it now, Tom.
ko: 너는 권력을 얻기 위해 나와 함께했어. 이제 너는 그것을 가졌어, 톰.

en: You've got it. I'm with you because I love you. Bullshit!
You're fucking me for my DNA. You're fucking me for a fucking ladder
ko: 너는 내 DNA를 위해 나를 이용하고 있어.

en: because your whole family is striving in parochial.
ko: 너는 사다리를 위해 나를 이용했어. 너의 가족은 모두 좁은 세계에 갇혀 있어.

en: That's not a fair characterization. Oh, no?
ko: 아, 아니. 네 엄마는 너보다 나를 더 사랑해.

en: Well, your mom loves me more than she loves you because she's cracked.
You want to actually clear the air? Fine.
You were going to see me get sent to fucking prison, Shiv.
ko: 너는 내가 감옥에 가는 걸 보려고 했어.

en: And then you fogged me off with that fucking undrinkable wine
ko: 너는 그 마실 수 없는 와인으로 나를 저지했어. 그리고 너는 내 아이를 가질 수 없어.

en: and you won't have my baby because you never even thought honestly you'd be with me more than like four fucking years.
ko: 너는 솔직히 나와 함께할 거라고 생각조차 하지 않았어. 4년 정도는 더.

en: You offered to go to jail, Tom. You offered because you're servile.
You're just, you're servile. You are incapable of thinking about anybody other than yourself
